title: Fan made recreation of the 30 preview
display_title: Fan made recreation of the 30 preview
wikitext:
[]: Fan made recreation of the 3.0 preview [SPOILERS!]             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Mar 23, 2010 4:02 am [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pQ2Fd2f-5SY[/url] So yeah, some Japanese kids who most likely saw 2.0 in theaters and not as a low quality camrip like us gaijin have made a live action recreation of the 3.0 preview from the end of 2.0. The most noteworthy thing about it, IMHO: in the "Seele's Children Assembly" (linked to here seperatly) bit, they clearly identified the figure standing opposite to the four shadows as Kaworu. Now there were some who suggested it to be Fuyutski... but he is not . So, to all who thought the black clad figure to be Kaworu (like me): gloat and boast, kinsmen (and women)!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Mar 23, 2010 5:31 am It's cool and well done. It reminds me of the fan made Evangelion opening but better.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Mar 23, 2010 5:32 am pretty cool

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 23, 2010 10:10 am I saw this a month or so back. Interesting stuff, but it frightens me as Ever Re-Take (never seen it, don't plan to) images have. I thought the shadows were interesting too... But a part of me wonders if the Q preview isn't just a mock-up preview like the one for Ha was...

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Mar 23, 2010 12:26 pm It is most likely a mock-up, but the question was what can be seen in the mock-up. And even if it is only a mock-up, i'm pretty sure that Fuyutski won't be involved with the future plot in any meaningful way. He's a cool guy, but he has been such a non-presence so far, that i doubt that even his crush on Yui will be mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Mar 23, 2010 4:13 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Mar 23, 2010 5:50 pm Awesome. Kinda makes me feel stupid that they beat me and my friends to it, considering that I had discussed doing this with them for some time.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Mar 23, 2010 6:08 pm Dang...I wanna meet those cosplayers.

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Tue Mar 23, 2010 9:55 pm so the 4 shadows are obviously Shinji, Rei, Asuka and mari but wasnt mary supposed to enter Japan "covertly"? did NERV Japan get an instruction to have her in their arsenal or something or is she now a captive of NERV because of hijacking unit-02

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Mar 26, 2010 8:13 pm Very well done effects, reminds me very much of the live action Casshern Movie
